title: iria pauciflora
intro: Iria pauciflora, also known as the few-flowered iria, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The iria pauciflora is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
